basic_info.description: I'm a technical lead and software engineer with a systems background and a soft spot for practical tools that make people's jobs easier. A big part of my career has been working across hundreds of isolated enterprise environments spread across 150+ platforms, learning how each one is built, improving integrations, and making complex systems more repeatable. That hands-on depth now feeds the public work I enjoy most: AI-assisted products, developer tooling, and full-stack apps built with Python, React, and TypeScript. I like taking messy operational problems and shaping them into software that feels calm, useful, and maintainable. Outside of work, I'm a traveler, a lifelong learner, and someone who genuinely enjoys building things from scratch. Based in San Diego, I'm interested in thoughtful product, platform, and automation work with teams that care about both execution and trust.

projects.title: AI Ops Runbook Generator
projects.description: Browser-based tool that turns raw alerts into structured incident runbooks in seconds. I focused on format detection, prompt orchestration, local key storage, and a clean operator workflow that keeps everything client-side for a fast demo and a low-friction user experience.
projects.frontDescription: Browser-based tool that turns raw alerts into structured incident runbooks in seconds. I focused on the operator flow, fast formatting, and a UI that stays calm when the input is messy.
projects.backDescription: Browser-based tool that turns raw alerts into structured incident runbooks in seconds. I focused on format detection, prompt orchestration, and local-only key handling so the workflow stays fast without depending on a backend.
projects.impact: Turns noisy alerts into something an operator can act on immediately.
highlights: Client-side workflow with local key storage
Structured output from messy operational input
Polished incident-response demo with low setup friction

projects.title: Tiny Swarm Maze
projects.description: Retro-inspired simulation game exploring swarm coordination through short natural-language commands. I built a deterministic simulation core with async model parsing, telemetry, and a real-time WebSocket loop so experimentation stays responsive even when models are slow.
projects.frontDescription: Retro-inspired simulation game that makes swarm behavior feel understandable through fast visuals, short commands, and a playful interface.
projects.backDescription: Retro-inspired simulation game exploring swarm coordination through deterministic simulation, async model parsing, telemetry, and a real-time WebSocket loop.
projects.impact: Shows full-stack thinking, real-time state handling, and systems experimentation.
highlights: Deterministic simulation core
WebSocket-driven realtime updates
Python + TypeScript full-stack architecture

projects.title: repo-first-aid
projects.description: Python CLI that audits public repositories for the issues people notice first: template residue, missing trust files, broken deployment claims, tracked junk, and weak onboarding. I built it as a fast local check for maintainers who want a repo to feel polished before they share it.
projects.frontDescription: CLI audit tool built to catch the rough edges that make a public repo feel half-finished, from template residue to broken trust signals.
projects.backDescription: Python CLI that audits public repositories for template residue, missing trust files, deployment mismatches, tracked junk, and weak onboarding.
projects.impact: Helps repos feel cleaner, safer, and easier for other people to trust.
highlights: Fast local CLI for maintainers
Opinionated checks around trust and polish
Designed around the first impression of a repo

projects.title: gh-sentinel
projects.description: Notification filter for GitHub that deduplicates issues, pull requests, CI failures, and security alerts, then routes actionable updates through Signal, Slack, or email. It uses the gh CLI plus SQLite to cut down alert fatigue and avoid repeated noise.
projects.frontDescription: A focused monitoring concept for GitHub activity that cuts down noise and pushes only the updates a person actually needs to care about.
projects.backDescription: Notification filter for GitHub that deduplicates issues, pull requests, CI failures, and security alerts before routing actionable updates through Signal, Slack, or email.
projects.impact: Reduces alert fatigue by treating notification quality as part of the product.
highlights: Deduplication across multiple event types
SQLite-backed state to avoid repeated noise
Routing path for chat and email delivery

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Business Administration
education.school: Computer Information Systems, California State University, Fresno
U.S. Army Cyber Center of Excellence

experience.title: Technical Lead / Senior Systems Engineer
experience.description: Lead integration and readiness work across a fleet-scale environment made up of hundreds of isolated enterprise systems spanning 150+ platforms, while building internal tools that reduce manual effort and make engineering handoffs smoother. Recent work combines automation, process simplification, team workflow improvements, and early-stage AI-assisted diagnostics research.
experience.frontDescription: Led delivery across a fleet-scale technical environment while building tools and workflows that made complicated work easier for other engineers to understand and use. A lot of that meant translating messy operational reality into clean handoffs, calmer processes, and software people could trust.
experience.backDescription: Led integration and readiness work across hundreds of isolated enterprise environments spanning 150+ platforms, moving between independently built systems with their own identity, messaging, and core infrastructure. Recent work blends automation, process simplification, team workflow design, and early AI-assisted diagnostics research.
experience.scope: Worked across 150+ platforms and hundreds of isolated enterprise environments
highlights: Built internal automation that reduced manual review and handoff friction
Turned expert-only processes into repeatable workflows newer engineers could run
Led integration, readiness, and cross-team coordination in a high-complexity environment

experience.title: Senior Systems Engineer
experience.description: Improved installation workflows, documentation, and cross-team coordination for large-scale system rollouts across distinct enterprise environments. A consistent focus was turning tribal knowledge into repeatable processes so newer engineers could ramp faster and contribute with more confidence.
experience.frontDescription: Improved delivery by turning scattered knowledge into clearer processes, stronger documentation, and smoother coordination. It was the kind of work that makes teams easier to onboard and projects easier to ship.
experience.backDescription: Improved installation workflows, documentation, and cross-team coordination for large-scale rollouts across distinct enterprise environments, with a constant focus on repeatability and faster ramp-up.
experience.scope: Supported large-scale multi-environment rollout and integration work
highlights: Reduced friction in preproduction installation work
Standardized documentation and handoff practices
Helped newer engineers become productive faster

experience.title: IT Project Manager
experience.description: Coordinated regional IT projects and network consolidation efforts, keeping schedules, stakeholders, and implementation details aligned during fast-moving delivery work.
experience.frontDescription: Managed regional IT delivery work with an emphasis on keeping people aligned, scope understandable, and execution moving.
experience.backDescription: Coordinated regional IT projects and network consolidation efforts, keeping schedules, stakeholders, and implementation details aligned during fast-moving delivery work.
experience.scope: Coordinated regional projects across networks and implementation teams
highlights: Aligned schedules, stakeholders, and implementation details
Kept fast-moving work visible and organized
Bridged technical tasks and project delivery needs

experience.title: Project Team Lead / Test Engineer / Business Analyst
experience.description: Started in test and analysis roles, then stepped into team leadership responsibilities across firmware, hardware, and process improvement efforts. That mix of hands-on testing and people coordination still shapes how I approach engineering work today.
experience.frontDescription: Grew from testing and analysis into leadership by being the person who could move between details, people, and process.
experience.backDescription: Started in test and analysis roles, then stepped into leadership across firmware, hardware, and process improvement work.
experience.scope: Worked across testing, hardware, firmware, and team coordination
highlights: Hands-on testing and analysis foundation
Early leadership in cross-functional delivery
Built habits around process improvement and communication

recommendations.author: Karen H., Software Engineer
recommendations.text: Collaborating with Steven at Flatiron School was a defining experience in my educational pursuit. As the driving force behind our team, Steven guided us through creating a front-end client website utilizing JavaScript and React. His expertise in coding and design principles was evident in the polished outcome of our project. What truly set Steven apart, however, was his commitment to nurturing the team's growth. He took on the role of mentor, equipping us with new tools and methodologies while ensuring everyone could contribute meaningfully. Steven's ability to harmonize technical proficiency with effective communication and support elevated our collaboration to new heights of success and fulfillment.

recommendations.author: David W., CTO at LP3
recommendations.text: In two transformative years working alongside Steven, his exemplary leadership as an IT Project Manager and Sr. Systems Engineer stood out. Steven possesses a rare talent for unifying diverse teams, guiding them towards a common vision with ease and conviction. His mastery in facilitating productive SCRUM meetings ensured every team member felt heard and valued, transforming potential conflicts into creative solutions. Steven's unwavering commitment extended beyond regular hours, always ready to address challenges with a solution-focused mindset. Whether leading from the front or supporting as a team member, Steven's contribution was pivotal in our projects' success. His exceptional blend of technical acumen, leadership, and empathy makes him an invaluable asset to any team.

recommendations.author: Polo M., Sr. Systems Engineer
recommendations.text: Steven distinguishes himself through an exceptional work ethic and outstanding engineering expertise. During our collaboration on critical system development projects at SPAWAR, his relentless drive and superior organizational skills were pivotal to our success. Beyond technical prowess, Steven's strategic management ensured our teams remained focused and cohesive, effectively navigating complexities to maintain project momentum. His contributions were not just valuable; they were transformative, setting new standards for excellence and team synergy.

recommendations.author: Sneha N., While At Cisco Systems
recommendations.text: At Cisco, Steven was not just a manager but a mentor who offered me a leadership role on a crucial project as an intern. His innovative approach and readiness to share insights not only propelled our project forward but also significantly influenced my professional growth. Steven's ability to mentor amidst a demanding schedule showcased his dedication to nurturing emerging talent.

recommendations.author: Kavya P., While At Cisco Systems
recommendations.text: Steven's unique approach to leadership, characterized by a genuine interest in team development and leveraging individual strengths, has significantly contributed to project efficiency and team cohesion.

recommendations.author: Anmmar A., MBA
recommendations.text: Known for his trustworthiness and exceptional team collaboration skills, Steven's intellectual prowess and passion for teaching have greatly contributed to his team's growth and project success, marking him as an outstanding leader.
